summary: A clip from a joint-session address. One frame shows a man with light hair in a dark suit and red tie speaking at the rostrum microphones with a gavel and figures seated behind him; a caption reads 'have a good life.'. Another frame shows a man in the gallery embracing a small girl in a dark dress with a white bow as people around them applaud.

script.scene: A man in a dark suit and red tie speaks at the rostrum; caption 'have a good life.'.
A man in the gallery embraces a small girl in a dark dress with a white bow as people applaud.
